subcodes.first_line: O assured soul! Like unto the revered Prince of Worshippers, remain thou, by night and by day, in a state of bowing and prostration, communing with the Sovereign Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نفس موقنه حضرت سیدالساجدین لیلا و نهارا در رکوع و سجود و بمناجات با سلطان
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
